title: ECPDef Function
parameters: ECPNumber	Integer expression representing which ECP to return status for.
see_also:
Returns ECP definition status.

Arm, Armset, ECPSet

ECPDef Example

Function DisplayECPDef(ecpNum As Integer)

   If ECPDef(ecpNum) = False Then

      Print "ECP ", ecpNum, "is not defined"

   Else

      Print "ECP ", ecpNum, ": ",

      Print ECPSet(ecpNum)

   EndIf

Fend
